scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=oh-my-task-cli && npm run build --workspace=oh-my-task-pi
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=oh-my-task-cli && npm run test --workspace=oh-my-task-pi
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=oh-my-task-cli && npm run typecheck --workspace=oh-my-task-pi
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
